prompt: Add the bat command line tool to my Homebrew packages as the plain string "bat" only, with no inline comments.

provider.note: The key value is never written to this report. Failures may reflect provider billing/auth state.

safety.note: Discard/build confirmation is only allowed when disposable config mode is explicitly proven.

prFocus.title: Add Computer Use E2E non-blocking PR report

video.note: Video assembled at 30 fps from Computer Use screenshots. This is an evidence reel, not a continuous screen recording.

cleanup.note: Remote app state was not restored by this runner. CI wrapper is responsible for remote app-support backup/restore; local artifacts are retained.

claims.claim: App launches and first screen is usable
claims.evidence: Computer Use saw the nixmac app window, prompt surface, progress stepper, and top-level controls.

claims.claim: Update banner does not block the main workflow
claims.evidence: A visible Dismiss button was clicked and the UI remained usable.

claims.claim: Settings General tab visibly renders
claims.evidence: Settings opened and General-related content was visible.

claims.claim: Settings AI Models tab visibly renders
claims.evidence: AI Models settings content was visible with provider/model controls.

claims.claim: Settings API Keys tab visibly renders
claims.evidence: API Keys content was visible after Computer Use polling, including OpenRouter/API key controls.

claims.claim: Settings Preferences tab visibly renders
claims.evidence: Preferences settings content was visible with confirmation controls.

claims.claim: My History opens and renders
claims.evidence: History rendered a visible state.

claims.claim: Console opens and renders
claims.evidence: Console rendered visible content.

claims.claim: Give Feedback opens and can be cancelled
claims.evidence: Feedback dialog rendered and no submission was made.

claims.claim: Report Issue opens and can be cancelled
claims.evidence: Report Issue dialog rendered and no submission was made.

claims.claim: Home suggestion cards are visible/clickable
claims.evidence: A suggestion card was clicked and the UI remained usable.

claims.claim: A typed real intent can be submitted
claims.evidence: Computer Use entered the real prompt into the app prompt field.

claims.claim: Real provider workflow reaches Review
claims.evidence: The real provider workflow reached Review or a Review-equivalent state.

claims.claim: Summary tab renders after intent review
claims.evidence: Summary described the requested bat/Homebrew package intent.

claims.claim: Diff tab renders after intent review
claims.evidence: Diff rendered a candidate Homebrew configuration change for bat.

claims.claim: Build & Test destructive boundary appears before activation
claims.evidence: Build & Test presented a visible confirmation/boundary before activation.

claims.claim: Step 3 Save / Keep changes persists a change
claims.evidence: Step 3 Commit persisted the generated bat/Homebrew change in the disposable config repo and left the worktree clean.

claims.claim: Rollback cleanup returns disposable config to clean state
claims.evidence: History restore rollback returned the disposable config tree to pre-test baseline content with a clean worktree; the top-level nix build result symlink was ignored as a build artifact.

claims.claim: Discard confirmation is guarded and only confirmed in disposable state
claims.evidence: Discard was intentionally not exercised because the stronger Step 3 save plus History restore cleanup path returned the disposable config to baseline.

claims.claim: Core UX/UI surfaces are captured and inspectable
claims.evidence: Screenshots/text snapshots cover the core app shell, settings, support dialogs, prompt input, and provider flow.

claims.claim: Scenario results include inspectable visual/text evidence
claims.evidence: Every passing scenario has a linked screenshot or redacted accessibility text artifact in the proof catalog.

claims.claim: Main branch user-visible coverage stays mapped
claims.evidence: Coverage drift detected against main: Unmapped user-visible candidate files: apps/native/src/components/widget/homebrew-badge.tsx Explicit waivers: onboarding-permissions: Current remote lane starts from a configured app state. This must become a dedicated clean-profile Computer Use scenario before the suite can honestly claim full main coverage. | sudo-local-activation-fixture: The DXU remote lane disables sudo_local in the disposable fixture because unattended MacinCloud AppleScript activation can hang while creating /etc/pam.d/sudo_local. This is an explicit CI fixture waiver, not proof that the production sudo_local path works. | preview-indicator: Not yet in the remote major-feature lane; needs either a deterministic preview-state setup or a real workflow that activates it.

waivers.label: First-run permissions and nix setup/onboarding
waivers.reason: Current remote lane starts from a configured app state. This must become a dedicated clean-profile Computer Use scenario before the suite can honestly claim full main coverage.

waivers.label: nix-darwin sudo_local activation path
waivers.reason: The DXU remote lane disables sudo_local in the disposable fixture because unattended MacinCloud AppleScript activation can hang while creating /etc/pam.d/sudo_local. This is an explicit CI fixture waiver, not proof that the production sudo_local path works.

waivers.label: Preview indicator floating commit/revert UI
